message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam linetype ortho

' --- Aggregate boxes (top) ---
package "<aggregate> ProductOrder" as AggProductOrder {
  class "TotalPriceWithoutVAT" as C_TotalPriceWithoutVAT <<C>>
  class "OrderItem" as E_OrderItemAgg <<E>>
  class "ProductOrder" as E_ProductOrderAgg <<E>>
  class "TotalVolume" as C_TotalVolume <<C>>
  class "Status" as C_Status <<C>>
  class "TotalPriceWithVAT" as C_TotalPriceWithVAT <<C>>
  class "BillingAddress" as C_BillingAddress <<C>>
  class "DeliveryAddress" as C_DeliveryAddress <<C>>
  class "TotalWeight" as C_TotalWeight <<C>>
}

package "<aggregate> AGV" as AggAGV {
  class "AGVStatus" as C_AGVStatus <<C>>
  class "Model" as C_Model <<C>>
  class "BriefDescription" as C_BriefDescription <<C>>
  class "AGV" as E_AGVAgg <<E>>
  class "AGVPosition" as C_AGVPosition <<C>>
  class "MaxVolumeCapacity" as C_MaxVolumeCapacity <<C>>
  class "MaxWeightCapacity" as C_MaxWeightCapacity <<C>>
  class "AGVTask" as E_AGVTaskAgg <<E>>
  class "Range" as C_Range <<C>>
  class "AGVId" as C_AGVId <<C>>
}

' --- Main domain classes (bottom) ---
class "AGV" as AGVRoot <<entity>> <<root>> {
  -state
}

class "AGVTask" as AGVTask <<entity>> {
  -id
  -agvTaskDescription
}

class "ProductOrder" as ProductOrderRoot <<entity>> <<root>> {
  -numericalIdentifier
  -dateOfOrder
  -shipmentMethod
  -paymentMethod
}

class "OrderItem" as OrderItem <<entity>> {
  -itemQuantity
}

class "BriefDescription" as VO_BriefDescription <<value object>> {
  -briefDescription
}

class "Model" as VO_Model <<value object>> {
  -model
}

class "AGVPosition" as VO_AGVPosition <<value object>> {
  -agvPosition
}

class "AGVStatus" as VO_AGVStatus <<value object>> {
  -taskState
}

class "AGVId" as VO_AGVId <<value object>> {
  -id
}

class "Range" as VO_Range <<value object>> {
  -range
}

class "MaxWeightCapacity" as VO_MaxWeightCapacity <<value object>> {
  -maxWeightCapacity
}

class "MaxVolumeCapacity" as VO_MaxVolumeCapacity <<value object>> {
  -volume
}

class "TotalPriceWithoutVAT" as VO_TotalPriceWithoutVAT <<value object>>

class "TotalPriceWithVAT" as VO_TotalPriceWithVAT <<value object>>

class "DeliveryAddress" as VO_DeliveryAddress <<value object>>

class "BillingAddress" as VO_BillingAddress <<value object>>

class "Status" as VO_Status <<value object>>

class "TotalVolume" as VO_TotalVolume <<value object>>

class "TotalWeight" as VO_TotalWeight <<value object>>

' --- Relationships (left: AGV root) ---
AGVRoot --> VO_BriefDescription : characterized by
AGVRoot --> VO_Model : has
AGVRoot --> VO_AGVPosition : located in
AGVRoot --> VO_AGVStatus : collects
AGVRoot --> AGVTask : associated
AGVRoot --> VO_AGVId : has
AGVRoot --> VO_Range : respects
AGVRoot --> VO_MaxWeightCapacity : respects
AGVRoot --> VO_MaxVolumeCapacity : respects

VO_BriefDescription "1" <-- AGVRoot
VO_Model "1" <-- AGVRoot
VO_AGVPosition "1" <-- AGVRoot
VO_AGVStatus "1..*" <-- AGVRoot
AGVTask "1" <-- AGVRoot
VO_AGVId "1" <-- AGVRoot
VO_Range "1" <-- AGVRoot
VO_MaxWeightCapacity "1" <-- AGVRoot
VO_MaxVolumeCapacity "1" <-- AGVRoot

' --- Relationships (center/right: ProductOrder root) ---
AGVTask --> ProductOrderRoot : composed by
ProductOrderRoot --> OrderItem : composed by
ProductOrderRoot --> VO_TotalPriceWithVAT : is marked
ProductOrderRoot --> VO_DeliveryAddress : associated with
ProductOrderRoot --> VO_BillingAddress : associated with
ProductOrderRoot --> VO_Status : associated with
ProductOrderRoot --> VO_TotalVolume : associated with
ProductOrderRoot --> VO_TotalWeight : associated with
ProductOrderRoot --> VO_TotalPriceWithoutVAT : is marked

ProductOrderRoot "1..*" <-- AGVTask
OrderItem "1..*" <-- ProductOrderRoot
VO_TotalPriceWithVAT "1" <-- ProductOrderRoot
VO_DeliveryAddress "1" <-- ProductOrderRoot
VO_BillingAddress "1" <-- ProductOrderRoot
VO_Status "1" <-- ProductOrderRoot
VO_TotalVolume "1" <-- ProductOrderRoot
VO_TotalWeight "1" <-- ProductOrderRoot
VO_TotalPriceWithoutVAT "1" <-- ProductOrderRoot

@enduml
